ocr_text.text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive.
Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking.
AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine.
La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des
adultes qui désirent cesser de fumer.
not to have to step outside
Testimonials reflect their genuine experience with the product before accepting to participate
in this campaign. Experiences portrayed may not be representative of all product users.
Actual results may vary. This product may not be right for you. Always read and follow the label.

Regulatory warnings are prominent at the top and bottom. The background is a white-to-light grey gradient, and blue is used for accent elements. No ZONNIC logo is visible.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image features a testimonial about convenience, with a person in winter clothing and gloves, and a quote about not needing to step outside for a cigarette. Regulatory warnings are prominent at the top and bottom. The background is a white-to-light grey gradient, and blue is used for accent elements. No ZONNIC logo is visible.
CONTENT TYPE: educational

── LOGO ──
  Present: NO

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: NO
  ⚠ NO HALO DETECTED ON ANY LETTER — LOGO-DONT-01 VIOLATION

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: gradient
  Colours: white to light grey
  Gradient direction: top-to-bottom
  Description: The background is a soft gradient transitioning from white at the top to light grey at the bottom.

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: PRESENT
    Position: top of image
    Text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive. Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking. AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine. La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes qui désirent cesser de fumer.
    Bilingual: YES
  18+ age icon: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  Risk communication: PRESENT
    Position: bottom of image

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: Sans-serif fonts used throughout
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: "It's so much more convenient not to have to step outside for a cigarette."

── COLOURS ──

  Secondary colour usage: Secondary blue is used as an accent for icons and emphasis

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image features an educational testimonial about convenience, with a person in winter clothing and gloves, and a quote about not needing to step outside for a cigarette. The background is a soft gradient transitioning from white at the top to light grey at the bottom, and blue is used for accent elements. Regulatory warnings are clearly visible at the top and bottom, and the text is bilingual. Sans-serif fonts are used throughout, and the secondary blue is applied as an accent. However, the ZONNIC logo is completely missing from the image, and there is no halo present around the C or any letter. Additionally, the required 18+ age restriction icon is not present. These are critical violations: the logo and its distinctive halo are essential for brand identity, and the 18+ icon is a legal requirement. While the regulatory text and background are correct for educational content, the absence of the logo and age icon means this image does not meet brand or regulatory standards.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: The 18+ age restriction icon is missing from the image, which is a legal requirement for all marketing assets.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the circular 18+ icon at the bottom of the image, near the risk communication text.
violations.evidence: No 18+ icon detected anywhere in the image.

violations.rule_text: The ZONNIC logo consists of navy blue typographic text with a circular halo around the letter C. The halo colour varies by product flavour profile.
violations.issue: The ZONNIC logo is missing entirely from the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the ZONNIC logo with navy blue text and a circular halo around the C, using the correct flavour palette.
violations.evidence: No ZONNIC logo detected anywhere in the image.

violations.rule_text: Don't lose the C halo (logo without any halo on the C).

violations.fix_suggestion: Add the ZONNIC logo with the required halo around the C.
violations.evidence: No halo detected on any letter; logo is missing.
